name: Low Fat Bisquick Substitute
directions: Mix dry ingredients in food processor or electric mixer.
Slowly pour in the oil as the machine is running.
Scrape the sides of the bowl with a rubber spatula.
Mix thoroughly again.
Store in an airtight container in the freezer.

name: Crumb Cake Mix
directions: If a large bowl, combine all ingredients and mix thoroughly.
Spoon into a container with a tight-fitting lid.
Mix makes approximately 6 cups cake mix.
Close container and label with date and contents.
Store in dry place.
Use within 10 to 12 weeks.

similar.name: Fat Free Baking Mix (Like Bisquick) Copycat - Clone

name: Fat Free Supposed Bisquick Copycat Baking Mix
directions: Mix all ingredients very well.
For every 2 cups mix used add 1/2 cup fat free mayo. NOTE: this may replaces the usual shortening.
Yes they say you can lose the mayo for  applesauce, prunes, pureed squash or whatever you prefer.
This recipe may be made with all wheat flour or any combination.
Use like Bisquick.

name: Pancake Mix
directions: Stir together all ingredients in a large bowl; store in a zip-top plastic bag up to 6 weeks.

name: Original Bisquick Baking Mix Copycat
directions: Whisk dry ingredients together. Mix well.
Using an electric mixer, slowly stir in canola oil.
Mix until all lumps are gone and mixture is a uniform texture, about 1 minute.
Store in an airtight container.
